subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto them that have believed in the Self-Subsisting, when He came with the truth with manifest sovereignty. Verily doth it speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالقیوم اذ اتی بالحق بسلطان مشهود انه ینطق
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @station of the Manifestation of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
